title: uniface.InvalidSyntaxPropertyException
text: uniface.InvalidSyntaxPropertyException Exception thrown if the name of the syntax property specified as a parameter is invalid. Description This exception can be thrown by setSyntaxProperty() and setSyntaxProperties() . Related Links setSyntaxProperty() Retrieves the value of the specified syntax property for a field. setSyntaxProperties() Sets multiple syntax properties for a field. APIs: DSP Client-Side JavaScript The Uniface JavaScript API is a collection of object-oriented programming interfaces that can be used in dynamic server pages (DSPs) to manipulate Uniface data objects in the browser, without round-trip processing to the server.
